zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Bruyn於1420年出生在英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓時，他的父親Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire34歲，母親Elizabeth Retford16歲。他於大約1438年與Elizabeth Darcy在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年11月30日在英國英格蘭艾可素斯 奧肯登享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Bruyn于1420年出生在英国英格兰艾可馬爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire34岁，母亲Elizabeth Retford16岁。他于大约1438年与Elizabeth Darcy在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年11月30日在英国英格兰艾可素斯 奧肯登享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Bruyn was born in 1420, in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire, was 34 and his mother, Elizabeth Retford, was 16. He married Elizabeth Darcy about 1438, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 30 November 1461, in South Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Bruyn est né en 1420, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Retford, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Darcy environ 1438, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1461, à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Bruyn 1420 in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire 34 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Retford 16. Er hat um 1438 in Essex, England Elizabeth Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. November 1461 im Alter von 41 Jahren in South Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Bruynが1420年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshireは34歳，母Elizabeth Retfordは16歳であった。約1438年にイギリスエセックスでElizabeth Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年11月30日にイギリスイギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Bruyn(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Retford(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 에세스에서 Elizabeth Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 11월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Darcy aproximadamente 1438, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Bruyn родился в 1420 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Retford, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Darcy около 1438 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 ноября 1461 г. в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
